alert_name: Internal package name resolved from public PyPI
description: Package 'internal-utils' (matching internal namespace pattern 'internal-*') was downloaded from pypi.org by CI runner ci-runner-03 (10.100.0.15). The public registry version is 99.0.0, which is significantly higher than the known internal version 1.0.0. This matches the dependency confusion attack pattern.
recommended_actions: Identify all CI pipelines that installed internal-utils in the last 24 hours
Check installed version -- if 99.0.0, the pipeline is compromised
Rotate all secrets accessible from compromised runners
Block internal-utils on public PyPI at proxy level
_analyst_note: This alert fired 3 hours after the first compromised install. The gap is the detection latency -- your proxy log correlation rule runs every 60 minutes, and it took two correlation cycles plus analyst queue time to reach you.
